title: Risk Discipline
description: Twenty trades where every position is planned, every stop exists, risk never exceeds policy, and no profit comes from broken process.

title: Accept the Planned Loss
description: Losses are part of the system. Take at least three clean, planned-size losses — stops respected, process intact — without a single stopless trade.

criteria.label: 3+ well-played losses (good process, stop took it)

title: The Operator
description: Ten consecutive trades at or above the process bar — the habit, not the streak of luck.
